title: Nameless SMP
description: A vanilla+ ish modpack made for The Nameless SMP
body:
**The Nameless SMP** is the client-side modpack of its whitelist only Minecraft server. Embark on a journey with the popular Origins mod; Discover stunning landscapes filled with new plants, animals and foods with Wilderwild and Bountiful fares; Learn to control color and discover the mysteries behind the remaind of an ancient civilisation with Spectrum, and more!

**[Join the discord](https://discord.gg/9FVtUv44GK) to get Whitelisted**

Mods from curseforge:
- [Seleni](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/seleni)
- [Even more origins](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/even-more-origins)
